interface.longDescription: With Close's ChatGPT app, ChatGPT will be able to reference and update Close for any task you can dream up. Whether you need to generate a custom report, research and create a new lead list, get a summary of recent interactions with a customer, or create new Workflows - all you have to do is ask ChatGPT to take care of it for you.
defaultPrompt: Find Close opportunities with no recent activity and summarize recommended next steps.
Search Close for leads from a company and summarize status, owner, and last touch.
Create a pipeline review from Close for deals closing this month.
